title: Values of a register named mem aren't generated in VCD during OpenC910 simulation with Verilator v5.026

features.name: memory array with parameterized depth using power-of-two calculation
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration where depth is calculated as 2**(ADDRWIDTH) and data width is parameterized

features.name: synchronous memory write with address indexing
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered on posedge clock that writes to a memory array element using an address port as index

features.name: memory array named mem with register output
features.description: Code should include a memory array named mem alongside a register output port with the same data type
